---
title: "Zhang Lab | University of Kentucky"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header:
        - includes/site-head.html
        - includes/head/home.html
---

<section class="hero" aria-labelledby="home-title">
<div class="site-shell hero-grid">
<div class="hero-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Department of Biostatistics, University of Kentucky</p>
<h1 id="home-title">Methods and software for biomedical discovery.</h1>
<p class="hero-lede">Our lab brings together statistical expertise, bioinformatics, and accessible analytical tools for biomedical research.</p>
<div class="button-row">
<a class="button button-primary" href="research.html">Explore our research</a>
<a class="button button-secondary" href="software.html">View software &amp; apps</a>
</div>
</div>
<aside class="hero-panel" aria-label="Lab website overview">
<h2>One place for the lab's public work.</h2>
<p>Find current research themes, open-source R packages, Shiny applications, and publications from the lab.</p>
</aside>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="research-themes">
<div class="site-shell">
<div class="section-heading">
<p class="eyebrow">Research</p>
<h2 id="research-themes">A method-centered research portfolio.</h2>
<p>Our public tools currently span cytokine profiling, continuous glucose monitoring, and reproducible analytical workflows.</p>
</div>
<div class="card-grid card-grid-three">
<article class="feature-card">
<p class="card-index">01</p>
<h3>Cytokine profiling</h3>
<p>Quality control and statistical analysis workflows that help researchers investigate cytokine data with confidence.</p>
</article>
<article class="feature-card">
<p class="card-index">02</p>
<h3>CGM analytics</h3>
<p>Methods and tools for reviewing glucose-monitoring data, studying missingness, and producing interpretable outputs.</p>
</article>
<article class="feature-card">
<p class="card-index">03</p>
<h3>Analytical tools</h3>
<p>R packages and interactive applications designed to make robust analysis more approachable and reproducible.</p>
</article>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section section-muted" aria-labelledby="featured-tools">
<div class="site-shell">
<div class="section-heading section-heading-split">
<div>
<p class="eyebrow">Featured tools</p>
<h2 id="featured-tools">Built for researchers, not just programmers.</h2>
</div>
<a class="text-link" href="software.html">See all software <span aria-hidden="true">→</span></a>
</div>
<div class="featured-grid">
<article class="tool-preview">
<p class="tool-type">R package</p>
<h3>CytoProfile</h3>
<p>Comprehensive cytokine data quality control, exploratory analysis, and multivariate methods.</p>
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/saraswatsh/CytoProfile" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://cran.r-project.org/package=CytoProfile" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CRAN <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://cytoprofile.cytokineprofile.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Documentation <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</article>
<article class="tool-preview">
<p class="tool-type">Shiny application</p>
<h3>CytokineProfile Shiny</h3>
<p>A guided interface for cytokine-data workflows, from upload and filtering through analysis and export.</p>
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/ZhangLabUKY/CytokineProfileShinyApp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://shiny.cytokineprofile.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open app <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</article>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section cta-section" aria-labelledby="people-callout">
<div class="site-shell cta-layout">
<div>
<p class="eyebrow eyebrow-light">People</p>
<h2 id="people-callout">Meet the people behind the work.</h2>
<p>Learn about the lab's leadership, contributors, and future collaborators.</p>
</div>
<a class="button button-light" href="people.html">Meet the lab</a>
</div>
</section>
